name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W212/S212, C207/A207 (3.0L V6 diesel)

serviceNotes.engine oil: Updated to 10,000 km / 12 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7612-2009/service (E 350 CDI W212 OM642 Tier 2). Rec 8,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 10,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7612-2009/service (was 60,000 km / 48 months).
serviceNotes.coolant: Updated to 90,000 km / 60 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7612-2009/service (90,000 km or 5 years).

serviceSources.engine oil: Changed from 25,000 km / 12 months to 10,000 km / 12 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7612-2009/service (Mercedes E 350 2009 CDI W212, Tier 2)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust / pollen filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W212 scheduled maintenance item; engine-related intervals on same chassis: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7612-2009/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 10,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7612-2009/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W212
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W212 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 30,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7612-2009/service
serviceSources.coolant: Changed from 150,000 km to 90,000 km / 60 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7612-2009/service (90,000 km or 5 years, whichever first)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: 722.9 / 7G-Tronic preventive ATF ~60,000 km — specialist practice (Mercedes markets sealed-for-life; fluid still degrades)
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km preventive between OEM coolant renewals
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Changed REC from 100,000 km to 90,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7612-2009/service (serpentine / drive belt)
